items.name: Wizard's Tower
items.subtitle: Our first building! Testing out WorldEdit on the Wizard's Tower near Draynor. Trialling a landscaping - foundation planning - walls and exterior - roof exterior - decorate exterior - design interior - design underground - lighting - homely touches. Includes connecting bridge

items.name: Lumbridge West exterior
items.subtitle: Building the chapel, houses, paths, flora, graveyard and bridge. Don't forget Bob's axes!

items.name: Agree block palette
items.subtitle: Test out and agree palette for housing and landmarks across Misthalin.

items.name: Download supporting mods
items.subtitle: Figure out exactly what we need to build this well. Adding WorldEdit + supporting packs (CUI).
items.what:
25/04: Identified WorldEdit mod builds compatible with conquest reforged and trialled in sandbox by building a wizard’s tower POC.

27/04: Investigated Ardacraft's modpacks - some good content including Conquest:Architects and Conquest:Hearthfire (as well as minor packs). We decided not to include Create at this stage. We will use native tree functionality. 

Quest Complete!

items.name: Identify foundation map
items.subtitle: Scout out different options for the foundation of Gielinor. Scan ProjectMC and forums for pre-designed terrain in WorldPainter.
items.what:
26/04: We’ve had a look at a few options for maps and found some great contenders. Major thanks to Nosferatu8 for the excellent foundations of their map design - we will be building from this 👍

Quest complete!

items.name: Varrock square and rooftops
items.subtitle: Banks, streets, roofs, walls, market stalls, and the first dense city. To break up into smaller tickets.

images.caption: Current roof palette and street density test.

items.name: Lumbridge Castle build
items.subtitle: Our first major build ticket! Foundations, castle walls, and castle design.

images.caption: Completed castle-courtyard scale and path-width proof.
